sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74877" key="o)ressipo/los" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρεσσῐ-πόλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n74877.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὀρεοπόλος</ref></xr>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2045.tlg001.perseus-grc1:13:137" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">13.137</biblScope></bibl>, prob. cj. ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2045.tlg001.perseus-grc1:14:250" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14.250</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
